name: Pinterest Unpacking Connector
long_description: Connects Pinterest to Claude for mood-board analysis. Lists your boards, fetches pins as images Claude can see, and turns a board into a structured brand-experience brief — world, mood, named color theme, sonic palette, materials, and product directions. Includes /board and /unpack slash commands.

access_token.title: Pinterest Access Token
access_token.description: Paste from .env (run `npm run auth` if you don't have one yet). Lasts ~30 days.
